title: `Aner #6063
definition:
Aner = "boy"

 n pr m
 1) one of the Amorite chiefs who aided Abraham in the pursuit of the
    4 invading kings

 n pr loc
 2) a Levitical city west of the Jordan in Manasseh allotted to the
    Kohathite Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Aner = "boy"

 n pr m
 1) one of the Amorite chiefs who aided Abraham in the pursuit of the
    4 invading kings

 n pr loc
 2) a Levitical city west of the Jordan in Manasseh allotted to the
    Kohathite Levites

    NASB:  an ally of Abram, also a place in Manasseh
